chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – Slaughters by of the People of the Book

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/26)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/26)
text: قَالَ هُوَ الِاسْمُ فَلَا يُؤْمَنُ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا مُسْلِمٌ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Al Ahmasy,
(It has been narrated) from Ibn Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It (slaughtering is upon) the Naming (Bismillah), therefore none can be relied upon except for a Muslim’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ibn abu ‘Umayr has narrated from al-Husayn al-Ahmasiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is a matter of the name (mentioning the name of Allah), thus, no one can be trusted in it except a Muslim.’”
